2026-0216
2026-03-13GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityOrder Ratifying the Agreement between the Government of Canada and Government of the Kingdom of Spain on the Protection of Classified InformationOrder authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the Kingdom of Spain on the Protection of Classified Information, done at Madrid on 9 September 2025.N/A
subject: Order Ratifying the Agreement between the Government of Canada and Government of the Kingdom of Spain on the Protection of Classified Information
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of the Kingdom of Spain on the Protection of Classified Information, done at Madrid on 9 September 2025.
